description: Memory write and read: store session content in memory and search for stored facts

operations.author: user
operations.text: My name is Alice and my favorite food is pizza.

operations.author: assistant
operations.text: Nice to meet you, Alice! Pizza is a great choice.

operations.author: user
operations.text: I also enjoy hiking on weekends.

operations.author: assistant
operations.text: Hiking is wonderful exercise. Where do you usually hike?
